ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* Given name of the character */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Family name of the character */,
  "patronus" TEXT /* Patronus of the character */,
  "species" INTEGER /* Species of the character (e.g., Human, Ghost, Centaur) */,
  "blood_status" INTEGER /* Blood status of the character (e.g., Pure-blood, Half-blood, Muggle-born) */,
  "wand" TEXT /* Type of wand used by the character */,
  "eye_colour" TEXT /* Eye color of the character */,
  "hair_colour" TEXT /* Hair color of the character */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the character */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the character */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the character */,
  "magical_abilities" TEXT /* List of magical abilities of the character */,
  "ancestry" TEXT /* Information about the character's ancestry */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was registered in the database */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the character's profile was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the character (e.g., alive, deceased, missing) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the character profile */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the character profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_blood_status FOREIGN KEY ("blood_status") REFERENCES blood_statuses ("blood_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "magical_properties" TEXT /* List of magical properties associated with the species */,
  "physical_properties" TEXT /* List of physical properties associated with the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the species entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the species entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_statuses" (
  "blood_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood status */,
  "blood_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the blood status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blood status */,
  "historical_context" TEXT /* Historical context about the blood status */,
  "cultural_impact" TEXT /* Cultural impact of the blood status in the wizarding world */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the blood status entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the blood status entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blood_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_statuses_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_statuses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the affiliation */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Founding date of the affiliation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the affiliation */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the leader of the affiliation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the affiliation (e.g., school, ministry, organization) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the affiliation entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the affiliation entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_affiliations" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliation */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the affiliation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the character joined the affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the character left the affiliation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the character-affiliation relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the character-affiliation relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_affiliations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_affiliations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Official, Administrator, Authorized Personnel) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the Ministry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the character */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the character profile */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the note */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the character profile */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
